nodes.label: Sharing and Measuring
nodes.description: Understanding division as equal sharing and its connection to multiplication

nodes.label: Equal Sharing
nodes.description: Dividing things so everyone gets the same amount

nodes.label: Sharing Objects
nodes.description: Give out items one by one until all are shared equally

nodes.label: Sharing Measurements
nodes.description: Dividing lengths, weights, and quantities equally

nodes.label: Division Facts
nodes.description: Basic division equations that come from multiplication tables

nodes.label: Remainder
nodes.description: What is left over when things cannot be shared equally

nodes.label: Connection to Multiplication
nodes.description: Division and multiplication are opposite operations

nodes.label: Checking Answers
nodes.description: Multiply quotient by divisor to check if division is correct

nodes.label: Grouping
nodes.description: Making equal-sized groups and counting how many groups

nodes.label: Real Life Uses
nodes.description: Sharing food, cutting rope, packing items, distributing things fairly

nodes.label: Special Division Rules
nodes.description: Any number ÷ 1 = itself; any number ÷ itself = 1; 0 ÷ any number = 0
